augmentations.rawDescription: Feral Precision augments Feral Strike damage and Double-Strike chance.

scheduleOverrides.description: Feral Precision replaces the base Double-Strike chance; it does not add a second roll.

activationRoll.description: Feral Precision replaces the base Double-Strike chance on rounds 4, 6, and 8.

glossaryEntries.definition: Grants a second Basic Attack each round.

abilities.name: Feral Strike
abilities.rawDescription: After each Basic Attack: deal two independently targeted Physical Damage instances. Rounds 4, 6, and 8: 30% chance to gain Double-Strike for two rounds. Classified as Command while preserving Attack Modifier presentation.

notes: Two Physical Damage instances select independently; the same enemy may receive both.

activationRoll.description: One base Double-Strike chance on rounds 4, 6, and 8.

unresolvedQuestions: Ordering between the fixed-round check and the Basic Attack.

abilities.name: Warrior's Zeal
abilities.rawDescription: At Level 16+ and deployed in Vanguard: increase Venator Physical Damage from Commands and Habits by 16%; Left Flank ally Instinct and Initiative +20.

notes: Does not amplify raw Basic Attacks.

abilities.name: Hunter's Bane
abilities.rawDescription: Start of Combat: reduce Intelligence of one enemy in any lane, preferring Hunter breed with fallback, enhanced by Venator's Strength. Screenshot states no duration.

abilities.name: Dragon's Might
abilities.rawDescription: Start of Combat until end of combat: increase Venator Physical Damage Dealt excluding Basic Attacks.

abilities.name: Feral Precision
abilities.rawDescription: Augments Feral Strike: add one Physical Damage instance targeting the enemy with least current troops and replace Double-Strike chance on rounds 4, 6, and 8.

abilities.name: Armor Break
abilities.rawDescription: Start of Combat until end of combat: increase Physical Damage Received by one opposing enemy. Opposing-position is provisionally normalized to same-lane enemy for formation compatibility.

references.description: Enemy occupying Venator's lane, retained as provisional interpretation.

glossaryEntries.definition: Prevents Active Commands and Habits, but does not prevent Basic Attacks.

abilities.name: Desperate Ambush
abilities.rawDescription: Each round, when Venator is strictly below 50% Troop Capacity: select one enemy, preferring Hunter breed, deal Physical Damage, then attempt Overwhelm on that same selected target for two rounds.

notes: Venator command, trait, affinities, observation state, and five Habits were normalized from screenshot evidence.
Feral Strike stores two independently targeted Physical Damage instances and allows the same enemy to receive both.
Feral Precision is modeled as a Double-Strike chance override on rounds 4, 6, and 8, not a second roll.
Armor Break opposing-position targeting is retained as provisional and normalized to same-lane compatibility.
Requires Dragon Level 16+.

rawDescriptions.rawDescription: After each Basic Attack: deal two independently targeted Physical Damage instances. Rounds 4, 6, and 8: 30% chance to gain Double-Strike for two rounds. Classified as Command while preserving Attack Modifier presentation.
At Level 16+ and deployed in Vanguard: increase Venator Physical Damage from Commands and Habits by 16%; Left Flank ally Instinct and Initiative +20.
Start of Combat: reduce Intelligence of one enemy in any lane, preferring Hunter breed with fallback, enhanced by Venator's Strength. Screenshot states no duration.
Start of Combat until end of combat: increase Venator Physical Damage Dealt excluding Basic Attacks.
Augments Feral Strike: add one Physical Damage instance targeting the enemy with least current troops and replace Double-Strike chance on rounds 4, 6, and 8.
Start of Combat until end of combat: increase Physical Damage Received by one opposing enemy. Opposing-position is provisionally normalized to same-lane enemy for formation compatibility.
Each round, when Venator is strictly below 50% Troop Capacity: select one enemy, preferring Hunter breed, deal Physical Damage, then attempt Overwhelm on that same selected target for two rounds.
